verses.text: A man with a measuring line goes to measure Jerusalem. Planned restoration. God surveys the city He will rebuild.
A man with a measuring line goes to measure Jerusalem. Planned restoration. God surveys the city He will rebuild.
Jerusalem shall be as towns without walls; 'I... will be unto her a wall of fire round about, and... the glory in the midst.' Better than walls. God Himself is the defence and glory of His people.
Jerusalem shall be as towns without walls; 'I... will be unto her a wall of fire round about, and... the glory in the midst.' Better than walls. God Himself is the defence and glory of His people.
Jerusalem shall be as towns without walls; 'I... will be unto her a wall of fire round about, and... the glory in the midst.' Better than walls. God Himself is the defence and glory of His people.
Flee from the north country; 'deliver thyself, O Zion,' that dwellest with Babylon. Come out. God's people must leave the place of captivity behind.
Flee from the north country; 'deliver thyself, O Zion,' that dwellest with Babylon. Come out. God's people must leave the place of captivity behind.
He that touches you 'toucheth the apple of his eye'; their spoilers shall become a spoil. Tender care. To harm God's people is to wound what He holds most dear.
He that touches you 'toucheth the apple of his eye'; their spoilers shall become a spoil. Tender care. To harm God's people is to wound what He holds most dear.
'Sing and rejoice, O daughter of Zion: for... I will dwell in the midst of thee'; many nations shall join the LORD. Indwelling joy. God's presence and the gathering of the nations are cause for song.
'Sing and rejoice, O daughter of Zion: for... I will dwell in the midst of thee'; many nations shall join the LORD. Indwelling joy. God's presence and the gathering of the nations are cause for song.
The LORD shall inherit Judah and choose Jerusalem; 'be silent, O all flesh, before the LORD.' Holy hush. When God rises to act, all the earth should stand in awe.
The LORD shall inherit Judah and choose Jerusalem; 'be silent, O all flesh, before the LORD.' Holy hush. When God rises to act, all the earth should stand in awe.
